framework.name: AP2 Role-Based Architecture
framework.description: Six-actor model: User → User Agent → Shopping Agent → Credentials Provider → Merchant Endpoint → Merchant Payment Processor. The Credentials Provider is the key innovation — a separate entity that holds payment methods and handles consent, sitting between the agent and the payment network. This is NOT the agent holding credentials directly.
framework.raw_quote: A specialized entity responsible for the secure management and execution of payments credentials. It holds knowledge of the User's available payment methods, gets user consent (if deemed necessary) to share credentials with the SA.

source.title: AP2 specification - AP2 - Agent Payments Protocol Documentation
